tasks.label: 🏗️ Build Docker Container
tasks.command: echo 'Building Docker container...' && docker build -t yarn-cockpit-container .devcontainer/ && echo '✅ Container built successfully!'

tasks.label: 🚀 Start Dev Server
tasks.command: if [ -z  "$CONTAINER" ]; then docker run -it -v ${workspaceFolder}:/workspace -p 5173:5173 yarn-cockpit-container dev; else yarn dev --host 0.0.0.0; fi

tasks.label: 📦 Install Dependencies
tasks.command: if [ -z  "$CONTAINER" ]; then docker run -v ${workspaceFolder}:/workspace yarn-cockpit-container install; else yarn install; fi

tasks.label: 🧪 Run Tests
tasks.command: if [ -z  "$CONTAINER" ]; then docker run -v ${workspaceFolder}:/workspace yarn-cockpit-container test; else yarn test; fi

tasks.label: 🔨 Build
tasks.command: if [ -z  "$CONTAINER" ]; then docker run -v ${workspaceFolder}:/workspace yarn-cockpit-container run build; else yarn run build; fi

tasks.label: 🧹 Clean Install
tasks.command: if [ -z  "$CONTAINER" ]; then docker run -v ${workspaceFolder}:/workspace yarn-cockpit-container bash -c "rm -rf node_modules yarn.lock && yarn install"; else rm -rf node_modules yarn.lock && yarn install; fi

tasks.label: 📦 Merge Commit + Squash
tasks.command: git commit --no-edit; git reset --soft HEAD~2; git commit -m "feat(i18n): convert UI strings to i18n with Chinese translations"

tasks.label: 📦 Final Commit
tasks.command: git commit -m 'feat(i18n): convert UI strings to i18n with Chinese translations'

tasks.label: 📦 Commit #2
tasks.command: git commit -m 'feat(i18n): convert UI strings to i18n with Chinese translations'

tasks.label: 🔍 Find Conflicts
tasks.command: git fetch upstream master; git merge upstream/master --no-commit --no-ff 2>&1

tasks.label: 📦 Commit & Push
tasks.command: git add -A; git commit --amend --no-edit; git push --force-with-lease origin feature/i18n-support

tasks.label: 🔍 Find All $t() Calls
tasks.command: git grep -oh "\$t(['\"`][^)'\"`]+['\"`])" -- '*.vue' '*.ts' | Select-String -Pattern '\$t' | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '.*\$t.([^)]+).*', '$1' } | Sort-Object -Unique > d:\cockpit\tkeys.txt; Get-Content d:\cockpit\tkeys.txt | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count

tasks.label: ✅ Verify + Commit
tasks.command: node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('d:/cockpit/src/locales/zh.json','utf8')); console.log('OK')"; git add src/locales/zh.json; git commit --amend --no-edit; git push --force-with-lease origin feature/i18n-support

tasks.label: 🧹 Clean + Final Check
tasks.command: Remove-Item d:\cockpit\check-i18n.js,d:\cockpit\add-missing.js,d:\cockpit\tkeys.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; node d:\cockpit\node_modules\eslint\bin\eslint.js src/locales/zh.json 2>&1; git log --oneline -3

tasks.label: Analyze i18n keys
tasks.command: node check-dupes.js 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath analysis-result.txt -Encoding utf8; Get-Content analysis-result.txt

tasks.label: 🧹 Clean & Repush
tasks.command: Remove-Item 7za-noerr.cmd,add-keys.js,analysis-result.txt,analyze-zh.js,check-splash.js,find-dupes.js,fix-i18n-script.js,fix-msg.js,output.txt,unused-keys-result.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; git add -A; git commit --amend --no-edit; git log --oneline -3; git push --force-with-lease origin feature/i18n-support
